<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Pharma Pipeline" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-661" dy="-144" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="0" tooltips="1" connect="0" arrows="0" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1300" pageHeight="430" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=0;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=10;pointerEvents=0;" value="<img src='data:image/svg+xml;base64,' width='32' height='32'> <span style='color:#FF3621;font-weight:bold;font-size:11px;'>Databricks Workflow</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="330" width="1235" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;fillColor=#7AA116;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.s3;" value="AWS S3
